MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-17-2020 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND RELATED DATES. LISA VILLASENOR, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. TREVA STEWART, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT JESSICA MITROVICH VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT HAD AN IN-CAMERA PROCEEDING WITH MISS VILLASENOR AND THE COURT IS CONVINCED THAT HER HEALTH CONDITION IS JUSTIFIED TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AFTER AN AFFIRMATIVE SHOWING OF GOOD CAUSE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1332(C)(3). THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/5/20 IS VACATED AND A NEW TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 4/26/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT AND EXPERT WITNESSES PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE MAY PROCEED WITH DEADLINES TO CONFORM TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ALL OTHER FACT AND EXPERT DISCOVERY IS CLOSED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
